mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, avatar, email, phone, gender, dept_id, status, remark, last_login_time, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, nickname, avatar, email, phone, gender, dept_id, status, remark, last_login_time, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{gender}, #{deptId}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{lastLoginTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET nickname=#{nickname}, avatar=#{avatar}, email=#{email}, phone=#{phone}, gender=#{gender}, dept_id=#{deptId}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = 1 WHERE id IN #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
